mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE_ACCESS_${search_year} WHERE member_seq_no = #{member_seq_no} AND member_seq_no IS NOT NULL

SELECT access_idx, homepage_id, access_date, browser_type, access_ip, browser_version, (select homepage_name from cms_homepage B where b.homepage_id = a.homepage_id) as homepage_name FROM ( ${pagingTop} SELECT access_idx, homepage_id, access_date, browser_type, access_ip, browser_version FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE_ACCESS_${search_year} WHERE member_seq_no = #{member_seq_no} AND member_seq_no IS NOT NULL ORDER BY access_idx DESC ${pagingBottom} ) A ORDER BY access_idx DESC
